Tables.Name: public.categories
Tables.Description: Product categories grouped into departments for merchandising analysis.

Fields.Name: category_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the category.

Fields.Name: category_name
Fields.Description: Category name such as Laptops or Coffee.

Fields.Name: department
Fields.Description: Higher level department such as Electronics or Grocery.

Tables.Name: public.customers
Tables.Description: People and organizations that place orders, segmented for marketing and value analysis.

Fields.Name: customer_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the customer.

Fields.Name: first_name
Fields.Description: Customer first name.

Fields.Name: last_name
Fields.Description: Customer last name.

Fields.Name: email
Fields.Description: Customer email address (synthetic, non-routable domains).

Fields.Name: segment
Fields.Description: Customer segment: Consumer, Corporate, or Small Business.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: Customer city.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the customer.

Fields.Name: region_id
Fields.Description: Region this customer rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Customer latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Customer longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: signup_date
Fields.Description: Date the customer first registered.

Tables.Name: public.dates
Tables.Description: Calendar date dimension, one row per day, used to filter and group every sales fact by time.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer surrogate key in yyyymmdd form that orders and order_items join to.

Fields.Name: full_date
Fields.Description: The actual calendar date.

Fields.Name: year
Fields.Description: Four digit calendar year.

Fields.Name: quarter
Fields.Description: Calendar quarter from 1 to 4.

Fields.Name: month
Fields.Description: Calendar month number from 1 to 12.

Fields.Name: month_name
Fields.Description: Full month name such as January.

Fields.Name: day_of_month
Fields.Description: Day number within the month from 1 to 31.

Fields.Name: day_of_week
Fields.Description: Day of week where 1 is Monday and 7 is Sunday.

Fields.Name: day_name
Fields.Description: Full weekday name such as Monday.

Fields.Name: is_weekend
Fields.Description: True when the day is Saturday or Sunday.

Fields.Name: is_holiday
Fields.Description: True when the day is a recognized US retail holiday.

Tables.Name: public.order_items
Tables.Description: Order line detail, one row per product on an order, for basket and product level analysis.

Fields.Name: order_item_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the order line.

Fields.Name: order_id
Fields.Description: Order this line belongs to.

Fields.Name: product_id
Fields.Description: Product sold on this line.

Fields.Name: quantity
Fields.Description: Units sold on this line.

Fields.Name: unit_price
Fields.Description: Price per unit charged on this line in US dollars.

Fields.Name: discount
Fields.Description: Fractional discount applied to the line, 0 to 1.

Fields.Name: line_total
Fields.Description: Net dollars for the line after discount.

Fields.Name: is_returned
Fields.Description: True when this line was returned.

Tables.Name: public.orders
Tables.Description: Order header, one row per placed order, summarizing who bought, where, when, and the total.

Fields.Name: order_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the order.

Fields.Name: order_date
Fields.Description: Date the order was placed.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: customer_id
Fields.Description: Customer who placed the order.

Fields.Name: store_id
Fields.Description: Store the order was attributed to.

Fields.Name: channel
Fields.Description: Sales channel: Online or In-Store.

Fields.Name: order_status
Fields.Description: Order status: Completed, Returned, or Pending.

Fields.Name: order_total
Fields.Description: Net order total in US dollars after line discounts.

Tables.Name: public.products
Tables.Description: Items available for sale, priced with a cost so margin can be computed.

Fields.Name: product_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the product.

Fields.Name: product_name
Fields.Description: Display name of the product.

Fields.Name: sku
Fields.Description: Stock keeping unit, unique per product.

Fields.Name: category_id
Fields.Description: Category this product belongs to.

Fields.Name: unit_price
Fields.Description: List selling price per unit in US dollars.

Fields.Name: unit_cost
Fields.Description: Cost to the business per unit in US dollars.

Tables.Name: public.regions
Tables.Description: Geographic sales regions that group stores and customers for territory analysis.

Fields.Name: region_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the region.

Fields.Name: region_name
Fields.Description: Region name such as West, South, Midwest, or Northeast.

Fields.Name: country
Fields.Description: Country the region belongs to.

Tables.Name: public.stores
Tables.Description: Physical retail stores where orders are placed, with real coordinates for mapping.

Fields.Name: store_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the store.

Fields.Name: store_name
Fields.Description: Display name of the store.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: City the store is located in.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the store.

Fields.Name: region_id
Fields.Description: Region this store rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Store latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Store longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: opened_date
Fields.Description: Date the store opened.

Tables.Name: public.account_types
Tables.Description: Catalog of account products grouped into deposit, credit, and loan categories.

Fields.Name: account_type_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the account type.

Fields.Name: type_name
Fields.Description: Account product name such as Checking or Mortgage.

Fields.Name: category
Fields.Description: High level grouping: Deposit, Credit, or Loan.

Tables.Name: public.accounts
Tables.Description: Individual accounts held by customers, each tied to a product type and home branch.

Fields.Name: account_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the account.

Fields.Name: customer_id
Fields.Description: Customer who owns the account.

Fields.Name: account_type_id
Fields.Description: Product type of the account.

Fields.Name: branch_id
Fields.Description: Home branch of the account.

Fields.Name: opened_date
Fields.Description: Date the account was opened.

Fields.Name: current_balance
Fields.Description: Current balance in US dollars; negative for credit and loan balances owed.

Fields.Name: status
Fields.Description: Account status: Active, Dormant, or Closed.

Tables.Name: public.branches
Tables.Description: Bank branch locations with real coordinates for mapping deposits and activity.

Fields.Name: branch_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the branch.

Fields.Name: branch_name
Fields.Description: Display name of the branch.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: City the branch is in.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the branch.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Region the branch rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Branch latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Branch longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: opened_date
Fields.Description: Date the branch opened.

Tables.Name: public.customers
Tables.Description: Banking customers segmented by relationship type, with credit score and location.

Fields.Name: customer_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the customer.

Fields.Name: first_name
Fields.Description: Customer first name.

Fields.Name: last_name
Fields.Description: Customer last name.

Fields.Name: segment
Fields.Description: Customer segment: Retail, Wealth, or Business.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: Customer city.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the customer.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Region the customer rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Customer latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Customer longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: credit_score
Fields.Description: FICO-style credit score from roughly 300 to 850.

Fields.Name: join_date
Fields.Description: Date the customer opened their first account.

Tables.Name: public.dates
Tables.Description: Calendar date dimension, one row per day, used to filter and group transactions by time.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer surrogate key in yyyymmdd form that transactions join to.

Fields.Name: full_date
Fields.Description: The actual calendar date.

Fields.Name: year
Fields.Description: Four digit calendar year.

Fields.Name: quarter
Fields.Description: Calendar quarter from 1 to 4.

Fields.Name: month
Fields.Description: Calendar month number from 1 to 12.

Fields.Name: month_name
Fields.Description: Full month name such as January.

Fields.Name: day_of_month
Fields.Description: Day number within the month from 1 to 31.

Fields.Name: day_of_week
Fields.Description: Day of week where 1 is Monday and 7 is Sunday.

Fields.Name: day_name
Fields.Description: Full weekday name such as Monday.

Fields.Name: is_weekend
Fields.Description: True when the day is Saturday or Sunday.

Fields.Name: is_holiday
Fields.Description: True when the day is a recognized US bank holiday.

Tables.Name: public.transactions
Tables.Description: Posted account transactions over time, the core fact for spend, cash flow, and fraud analysis.

Fields.Name: transaction_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the transaction.

Fields.Name: account_id
Fields.Description: Account the transaction posted to.

Fields.Name: txn_date
Fields.Description: Date the transaction posted.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: amount
Fields.Description: Transaction amount in US dollars, always positive; use direction for sign.

Fields.Name: direction
Fields.Description: Whether the transaction is a Credit (money in) or Debit (money out).

Fields.Name: merchant_category
Fields.Description: Spending category such as Groceries, Payroll, or Utilities.

Fields.Name: is_fraud
Fields.Description: True when the transaction was flagged as fraudulent.

Tables.Name: public.dates
Tables.Description: Calendar date dimension, one row per day, used to filter and group encounters by time.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer surrogate key in yyyymmdd form that encounters join to.

Fields.Name: full_date
Fields.Description: The actual calendar date.

Fields.Name: year
Fields.Description: Four digit calendar year.

Fields.Name: quarter
Fields.Description: Calendar quarter from 1 to 4.

Fields.Name: month
Fields.Description: Calendar month number from 1 to 12.

Fields.Name: month_name
Fields.Description: Full month name such as January.

Fields.Name: day_of_month
Fields.Description: Day number within the month from 1 to 31.

Fields.Name: day_of_week
Fields.Description: Day of week where 1 is Monday and 7 is Sunday.

Fields.Name: day_name
Fields.Description: Full weekday name such as Monday.

Fields.Name: is_weekend
Fields.Description: True when the day is Saturday or Sunday.

Fields.Name: is_holiday

Tables.Name: public.departments
Tables.Description: Clinical departments grouped into service lines for cost and utilization analysis.

Fields.Name: department_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the department.

Fields.Name: department_name
Fields.Description: Department name such as Cardiology or Orthopedics.

Fields.Name: service_line
Fields.Description: Higher level service line: Medical, Surgical, Diagnostic, or Emergency.

Tables.Name: public.encounter_charges
Tables.Description: Itemized charge lines for an encounter, one row per billed service, for cost-of-care breakdowns.

Fields.Name: charge_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the charge line.

Fields.Name: encounter_id
Fields.Description: Encounter this charge line belongs to.

Fields.Name: charge_category
Fields.Description: Charge category such as Room & Board, Lab, Imaging, Pharmacy, Surgery, or Consultation.

Fields.Name: quantity
Fields.Description: Number of units billed on this line.

Fields.Name: unit_price
Fields.Description: Price per unit charged on this line in US dollars.

Fields.Name: line_total
Fields.Description: Net dollars for the line, quantity times unit price.

Tables.Name: public.encounters
Tables.Description: Encounter header, one row per admission or visit, summarizing who was seen, where, when, length of stay, and the billed total.

Fields.Name: encounter_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the encounter.

Fields.Name: patient_id
Fields.Description: Patient seen during the encounter.

Fields.Name: facility_id
Fields.Description: Facility where the encounter took place.

Fields.Name: department_id
Fields.Description: Clinical department that handled the encounter.

Fields.Name: admit_date
Fields.Description: Date the patient was admitted or seen.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key for the admit date joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: discharge_date
Fields.Description: Date the patient was discharged; equals the admit date for same-day visits.

Fields.Name: encounter_type
Fields.Description: Encounter type: Inpatient, Outpatient, or Emergency.

Fields.Name: length_of_stay
Fields.Description: Length of stay in days, zero for same-day outpatient or emergency visits.

Fields.Name: encounter_total
Fields.Description: Total billed charge for the encounter in US dollars, equal to the sum of its charge lines.

Fields.Name: is_readmission
Fields.Description: True when this encounter is a 30-day readmission of a prior inpatient stay.

Tables.Name: public.facilities
Tables.Description: Care facilities such as hospitals and clinics, with real coordinates for mapping and bed capacity.

Fields.Name: facility_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the facility.

Fields.Name: facility_name
Fields.Description: Display name of the facility.

Fields.Name: facility_type
Fields.Description: Facility type: Hospital, Clinic, Urgent Care, or Surgical Center.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: City the facility is located in.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the facility.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Region the facility rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Facility latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Facility longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: bed_count
Fields.Description: Number of licensed inpatient beds at the facility.

Fields.Name: opened_date
Fields.Description: Date the facility opened.

Tables.Name: public.patients
Tables.Description: Patients receiving care, with demographics, a primary condition, modeled readmission risk, and home location.

Fields.Name: patient_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the patient.

Fields.Name: first_name
Fields.Description: Patient first name.

Fields.Name: last_name
Fields.Description: Patient last name.

Fields.Name: gender
Fields.Description: Patient gender: Female or Male.

Fields.Name: birth_date
Fields.Description: Patient date of birth.

Fields.Name: age_years
Fields.Description: Patient age in whole years.

Fields.Name: primary_condition
Fields.Description: Primary chronic condition such as Diabetes or Hypertension.

Fields.Name: readmission_risk
Fields.Description: Modeled probability from 0 to 1 that the patient is readmitted within 30 days.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: Patient home city.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the patient home.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Region the patient rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Patient home latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Patient home longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: registered_date
Fields.Description: Date the patient first registered with the provider.

Fields.Description: The actual calendar date.

Fields.Name: year

Fields.Name: quarter

Fields.Name: month_name

Fields.Name: day_of_month

Tables.Name: public.dealers
Tables.Description: Dealership locations with real coordinates for mapping, a size tier, and a customer satisfaction index.

Fields.Name: dealer_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the dealer.

Fields.Name: dealer_name
Fields.Description: Display name of the dealership.

Fields.Name: dealer_tier
Fields.Description: Dealer size tier: Flagship, Standard, or Compact.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: City the dealer is located in.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the dealer.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Region the dealer rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Dealer latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Dealer longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: csi_score
Fields.Description: Customer satisfaction index from 0 to 100.

Fields.Name: opened_date
Fields.Description: Date the dealership opened.

Tables.Name: public.sale_lines
Tables.Description: Itemized lines of a sale, one row per priced component, for gross-by-line and attach-rate analysis.

Fields.Name: sale_line_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the sale line.

Fields.Name: sale_id
Fields.Description: Sale this line belongs to.

Fields.Name: line_type
Fields.Description: Line type: Vehicle, Accessory, Warranty, or Fee.

Fields.Name: description
Fields.Description: Human readable description of the line item.

Fields.Name: quantity
Fields.Description: Number of units on this line.

Fields.Name: unit_price
Fields.Description: Price per unit on this line in US dollars.

Fields.Name: line_total
Fields.Description: Net dollars for the line, quantity times unit price.

Tables.Name: public.sales
Tables.Description: Sale header, one row per vehicle deal, summarizing the dealer, vehicle, financing, and out-the-door total.

Fields.Name: sale_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the sale.

Fields.Name: dealer_id
Fields.Description: Dealer that made the sale.

Fields.Name: vehicle_id
Fields.Description: Vehicle model sold.

Fields.Name: sale_date
Fields.Description: Date the sale closed.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: finance_type
Fields.Description: How the sale was paid: Cash, Loan, or Lease.

Fields.Name: is_new
Fields.Description: True for a new vehicle, false for a used vehicle.

Fields.Name: sale_total
Fields.Description: Out-the-door total for the sale in US dollars, equal to the sum of its sale lines.

Tables.Name: public.service_visits
Tables.Description: Service department visits over time, the fact for service revenue, mileage, and comeback-rate analysis.

Fields.Name: service_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the service visit.

Fields.Name: dealer_id
Fields.Description: Dealer service department that performed the work.

Fields.Name: vehicle_id
Fields.Description: Vehicle model serviced.

Fields.Name: service_date
Fields.Description: Date the service was performed.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: service_type
Fields.Description: Type of service: Maintenance, Repair, Recall, or Warranty.

Fields.Name: mileage
Fields.Description: Odometer reading at the time of service in miles.

Fields.Name: labor_hours
Fields.Description: Billed labor hours for the visit.

Fields.Name: service_cost
Fields.Description: Total cost charged for the service visit in US dollars.

Fields.Name: is_comeback
Fields.Description: True when the visit is a repeat repair for the same issue (a comeback).

Tables.Name: public.vehicles
Tables.Description: Catalog of vehicle models offered for sale, with class and manufacturer suggested retail price.

Fields.Name: vehicle_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the vehicle model.

Fields.Name: make
Fields.Description: Vehicle manufacturer such as Toyota or Ford.

Fields.Name: model
Fields.Description: Model name such as Camry or F-150.

Fields.Name: vehicle_class
Fields.Description: Body class: Sedan, SUV, Truck, EV, or Coupe.

Fields.Name: model_year
Fields.Description: Model year of the vehicle.

Fields.Name: msrp
Fields.Description: Manufacturer suggested retail price in US dollars.

Fields.Name: quarter
Fields.Description: Calendar quarter from 1 to 4.

Fields.Name: month

Fields.Name: month_name

Fields.Name: day_of_month

Fields.Description: Full weekday name such as Monday.

Tables.Name: public.plants
Tables.Description: Manufacturing plants with real coordinates for mapping and rated daily capacity.

Fields.Name: plant_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the plant.

Fields.Name: plant_name
Fields.Description: Display name of the plant.

Fields.Name: plant_type
Fields.Description: Plant type: Assembly, Stamping, Powertrain, or Components.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: City the plant is located in.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the plant.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Region the plant rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Plant latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Plant longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: capacity_units_per_day
Fields.Description: Rated maximum output of the plant in units per day.

Fields.Name: opened_date
Fields.Description: Date the plant began operations.

Tables.Name: public.production_lines
Tables.Description: Production lines within a plant, each dedicated to a product family with an OEE target.

Fields.Name: line_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the production line.

Fields.Name: plant_id
Fields.Description: Plant the line belongs to.

Fields.Name: line_name
Fields.Description: Display name of the line such as Line 3.

Fields.Name: product_family
Fields.Description: Product family the line produces, such as Engines or Body Panels.

Fields.Name: target_oee
Fields.Description: Target overall equipment effectiveness from 0 to 1.

Tables.Name: public.production_runs
Tables.Description: Per-shift production runs, the core fact for throughput, scrap, downtime, and OEE analysis over time.

Fields.Name: run_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the production run.

Fields.Name: line_id
Fields.Description: Line that executed the run.

Fields.Name: plant_id
Fields.Description: Plant the run took place at.

Fields.Name: run_date
Fields.Description: Date the run was executed.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: shift
Fields.Description: Work shift: Day, Swing, or Night.

Fields.Name: units_planned
Fields.Description: Units the run was scheduled to produce.

Fields.Name: units_produced
Fields.Description: Units actually produced during the run.

Fields.Name: units_scrapped
Fields.Description: Units produced that were scrapped for quality reasons.

Fields.Name: reject_rate
Fields.Description: Fraction of produced units scrapped, from 0 to 1.

Fields.Name: downtime_minutes
Fields.Description: Total unplanned downtime during the run in minutes.

Fields.Name: oee
Fields.Description: Realized overall equipment effectiveness for the run, from 0 to 1.

Fields.Name: scrap_cost
Fields.Description: Cost of scrapped units for the run in US dollars.

Tables.Name: public.quality_inspections
Tables.Description: Quality inspections of production runs, recording defect type and counts for Pareto and yield analysis.

Fields.Name: inspection_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the inspection.

Fields.Name: run_id
Fields.Description: Production run that was inspected.

Fields.Name: defect_type
Fields.Description: Primary defect category found, or None when the sample was clean.

Fields.Name: defect_count
Fields.Description: Number of defective units found in the inspected sample.

Fields.Name: inspected_units
Fields.Description: Number of units inspected in the sample.

Fields.Name: inspection_result
Fields.Description: Overall inspection result: Pass or Fail.

Tables.Name: public.consumption
Tables.Description: Hourly electricity demand by region and customer sector, the fact for load curves and price analysis.

Fields.Name: consumption_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the consumption record.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Demand region: West, South, Midwest, or Northeast.

Fields.Name: sector
Fields.Description: Customer sector: Residential, Commercial, or Industrial.

Fields.Name: consume_date
Fields.Description: Date of the demand reading.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: hour_of_day
Fields.Description: Hour of the day from 0 to 23 for the load-curve reading.

Fields.Name: demand_mwh
Fields.Description: Electricity demanded during the hour in megawatt-hours.

Fields.Name: avg_price_per_mwh
Fields.Description: Average wholesale price during the hour in US dollars per megawatt-hour.

Tables.Name: public.dates
Tables.Description: Calendar date dimension, one row per day, used to filter and group generation and consumption by time.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer surrogate key in yyyymmdd form that generation and consumption join to.

Fields.Name: full_date
Fields.Description: The actual calendar date.

Fields.Name: year
Fields.Description: Four digit calendar year.

Fields.Name: quarter
Fields.Description: Calendar quarter from 1 to 4.

Fields.Name: month
Fields.Description: Calendar month number from 1 to 12.

Fields.Name: month_name
Fields.Description: Full month name such as January.

Fields.Name: day_of_month
Fields.Description: Day number within the month from 1 to 31.

Fields.Name: day_of_week
Fields.Description: Day of week where 1 is Monday and 7 is Sunday.

Fields.Name: day_name
Fields.Description: Full weekday name such as Monday.

Fields.Name: is_weekend
Fields.Description: True when the day is Saturday or Sunday.

Fields.Name: is_holiday
Fields.Description: True when the day is a recognized US holiday.

Tables.Name: public.generation
Tables.Description: Daily electricity generated by each plant, the fact for generation-mix, capacity-factor, emissions, and outage analysis.

Fields.Name: generation_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the generation record.

Fields.Name: plant_id
Fields.Description: Plant that produced the energy.

Fields.Name: gen_date
Fields.Description: Date the energy was generated.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: energy_mwh
Fields.Description: Total energy generated that day in megawatt-hours.

Fields.Name: capacity_factor
Fields.Description: Realized output as a fraction of nameplate capacity, from 0 to 1.

Fields.Name: fuel_cost_per_mwh
Fields.Description: Variable fuel and operating cost per megawatt-hour in US dollars.

Fields.Name: co2_tons
Fields.Description: Carbon dioxide emitted that day in metric tons; zero for carbon-free sources.

Fields.Name: is_outage
Fields.Description: True when the plant suffered an unplanned outage that day, cutting output.

Tables.Name: public.power_plants
Tables.Description: Electricity generating stations with real coordinates for mapping, a fuel type, and nameplate capacity.

Fields.Name: plant_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the plant.

Fields.Name: plant_name
Fields.Description: Display name of the plant.

Fields.Name: fuel_type
Fields.Description: Generation fuel: Nuclear, Natural Gas, Coal, Hydro, Wind, or Solar.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: City the plant is located in.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the plant.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Region the plant rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Plant latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Plant longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: capacity_mw
Fields.Description: Nameplate generating capacity in megawatts.

Fields.Name: commissioned_date
Fields.Description: Date the plant entered service.

Tables.Name: public.dates
Tables.Description: Calendar date dimension, one row per day, used to filter and group usage and network metrics by time.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer surrogate key in yyyymmdd form that usage and network metrics join to.

Fields.Name: full_date
Fields.Description: The actual calendar date.

Fields.Name: year
Fields.Description: Four digit calendar year.

Fields.Name: quarter
Fields.Description: Calendar quarter from 1 to 4.

Fields.Name: month
Fields.Description: Calendar month number from 1 to 12.

Fields.Name: month_name
Fields.Description: Full month name such as January.

Fields.Name: day_of_month
Fields.Description: Day number within the month from 1 to 31.

Fields.Name: day_of_week
Fields.Description: Day of week where 1 is Monday and 7 is Sunday.

Fields.Name: day_name
Fields.Description: Full weekday name such as Monday.

Fields.Name: is_weekend
Fields.Description: True when the day is Saturday or Sunday.

Fields.Name: is_holiday
Fields.Description: True when the day is a recognized US holiday.

Tables.Name: public.network_metrics
Tables.Description: Daily health metrics per tower, the fact for uptime, latency, dropped-call, and traffic analysis over time.

Fields.Name: metric_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the metric record.

Fields.Name: tower_id
Fields.Description: Tower the metrics were recorded for.

Fields.Name: metric_date
Fields.Description: Date the metrics were recorded.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: uptime_pct
Fields.Description: Percentage of the day the tower was in service, from 0 to 100.

Fields.Name: avg_latency_ms
Fields.Description: Average round-trip network latency for the day in milliseconds.

Fields.Name: dropped_call_rate
Fields.Description: Fraction of calls dropped during the day, from 0 to 1.

Fields.Name: data_traffic_gb
Fields.Description: Total data carried by the tower during the day in gigabytes.

Fields.Name: is_outage
Fields.Description: True when the tower experienced an outage that day, depressing uptime.

Tables.Name: public.plans
Tables.Description: Catalog of rate plans subscribers can be on, with price and included data allowance.

Fields.Name: plan_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the plan.

Fields.Name: plan_name
Fields.Description: Display name of the plan such as Unlimited Plus.

Fields.Name: plan_type
Fields.Description: Plan type: Prepaid or Postpaid.

Fields.Name: monthly_price
Fields.Description: Recurring monthly price of the plan in US dollars.

Fields.Name: data_allowance_gb
Fields.Description: Included monthly data allowance in gigabytes; a nominal cap when the plan is unlimited.

Fields.Name: is_unlimited
Fields.Description: True when the plan offers unlimited data with no overage.

Tables.Name: public.subscribers
Tables.Description: Mobile subscribers with their plan, location, tenure, revenue, and modeled churn risk.

Fields.Name: subscriber_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the subscriber.

Fields.Name: first_name
Fields.Description: Subscriber first name.

Fields.Name: last_name
Fields.Description: Subscriber last name.

Fields.Name: plan_id
Fields.Description: Rate plan the subscriber is on.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: Subscriber city.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the subscriber.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Region the subscriber rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Subscriber latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Subscriber longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: status
Fields.Description: Subscriber status: Active, Suspended, or Churned.

Fields.Name: tenure_months
Fields.Description: Number of months the subscriber has been with the carrier.

Fields.Name: arpu
Fields.Description: Average revenue per user per month in US dollars.

Fields.Name: churn_risk
Fields.Description: Modeled probability from 0 to 1 that the subscriber churns.

Fields.Name: signup_date
Fields.Description: Date the subscriber joined the carrier.

Tables.Name: public.towers
Tables.Description: Cell tower sites with real coordinates for mapping, radio technology, and backhaul capacity.

Fields.Name: tower_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the tower.

Fields.Name: site_code
Fields.Description: Operational site code identifying the tower.

Fields.Name: technology
Fields.Description: Radio technology served: 4G LTE or 5G.

Fields.Name: city
Fields.Description: City the tower is located in.

Fields.Name: state
Fields.Description: Two letter US state code for the tower.

Fields.Name: region
Fields.Description: Region the tower rolls up to.

Fields.Name: latitude
Fields.Description: Tower latitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: longitude
Fields.Description: Tower longitude for map visualizations.

Fields.Name: backhaul_capacity_mbps
Fields.Description: Backhaul link capacity for the tower in megabits per second.

Fields.Name: status
Fields.Description: Operational status of the tower: Active or Maintenance.

Fields.Name: install_date
Fields.Description: Date the tower was installed.

Tables.Name: public.usage
Tables.Description: Monthly usage and billing per subscriber, the fact for data growth, ARPU, and overage analysis.

Fields.Name: usage_id
Fields.Description: Surrogate key for the usage record.

Fields.Name: subscriber_id
Fields.Description: Subscriber the usage belongs to.

Fields.Name: usage_month
Fields.Description: First day of the billing month the usage covers.

Fields.Name: date_key
Fields.Description: Integer date key for the billing month joining to the dates dimension.

Fields.Name: data_gb
Fields.Description: Mobile data consumed during the month in gigabytes.

Fields.Name: voice_minutes
Fields.Description: Voice minutes used during the month.

Fields.Name: sms_count
Fields.Description: Number of text messages sent during the month.

Fields.Name: overage_charge
Fields.Description: Overage charges billed for exceeding the plan allowance in US dollars.

Fields.Name: bill_amount
Fields.Description: Total billed amount for the month in US dollars, plan price plus overage.
